task_text:

than $200, and which customers they belong to.

content.text: Sure! Let me read that file right away.

content.text:
Based on the data in **invoices.csv**, there are **2 invoices** with an Amount Owed greater than $200:

| # | Customer | Amount Owed | Due Date |
|---|----------|-------------|----------|
| 1 | Marcus Webb | $220.00 | 2026-05-28 |
| 2 | Tyler Brooks | $340.25 | 2026-05-15 |

The remaining three customers — Jordan Ellis ($150.00), Priya Nair ($75.50), and Sofia Reyes ($0.00) — all fall at or below the $200 threshold.
